Email Confirmation Follow-up - Financial Planner                        Copyright Free Template

SUBJECT:  Thank You For Claiming [Insert Consultation/Report]!

Hi (First Name), 

Congratulations. Thank you for taking action and claiming
your FREE [Report/Consultation]!
 
You'll be on your way to a more secure future despite
all the "bad news" you hear and read about. That's 
because I'm going to share with you little-known 
secrets most financial planners will NEVER know. 

You can access your report here:  [If they're claiming a
consultation, direct the prospect regarding how they can find
you, set an appointment, etc.].

(Insert link)

Thanks, and I look forward to helping you reach your financial
goals. 

(Insert Name)

P.S. One of the "secrets" I'll reveal to you is how you can 
avoid constantly worrying about the markets
and bad news you see on CNBC and all the major 
networks. A solid plan makes these worries obsolete, and 

I look forward to ensuring your family's legacy.
